title: Record of sales proceedings to be kept for year
doc_html:
§523.  Record of sales proceedings to be kept for year

The person obtaining the sale of a motor vehicle under R.S. 32:521 shall keep a record of all proceedings of all sales made thereunder for a period of one year after the sale.
doc_text:
§523.  Record of sales proceedings to be kept for year
The person obtaining the sale of a motor vehicle under R.S. 32:521 shall keep a record of all proceedings of all sales made thereunder for a period of one year after the sale.
